violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bakery area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The walk-in deli, dairy, and produce gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bakery. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the produce and meat prep room fans have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the (bakery) area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.food storage shelves in bakery area. 2.fans and fan bases in the meat and deli walk in coolers. 3.deli display coolers observed with a buildup of liquid and debris inside vents. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

Outside trash compacter, loading docks, and along side of building observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and debris. Refuse areas should be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The floors in bakery and back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
